options.name: --explain-composite-paths
options.description: Display help about the syntax of composite paths.

options.name: --json
options.description:
Encode output in JSON and print it in a single line
in stdout. No files will be created and only errors
will be logged by default.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity of the tool's logs.

commands.name: new
commands.description:
Generate a skeleton program from a grammar file and a
Scriban template.
Use 'farkle <subcommand> --help' for additional information.

options.name: --outputfile
options.description:
The path the output file will be stored. Defaults to
the input file's name, with an extension set by the
template, which defaults to '.out.txt'.

options.name: --configuration
options.description:
The configuration the project will be evaluated with.
The default for most projects is Debug.

options.name: --framework
options.description:
The target framework of the project. Useful if it
uses multi-targeting.

options.name: --html
options.description:
Generate an HTML web page describing the grammar.
This is the default.

options.name: --custom-head
options.description:
A file whose content will be appended to the
resulting HTML page's head.

options.name: --no-css
options.description:
Do not generate inline CSS for the resulting HTML
page.

options.name: --no-lalr
options.description:
Do not generate the LALR state tables in the
resulting HTML page.

options.name: --no-dfa
options.description:
Do not generate the DFA state tables in the resulting
HTML page.

options.name: --templatefile
options.description:
Generate a file using this custom Scriban template.
See more in
https://teo-tsirpanis.github.io/Farkle/templating.html
.

options.name: --property
options.description:
Additional properties to be passed to your custom
template via the 'properties.myproperty' Scriban
variable.

options.name: --json
options.description:
Encode output in JSON and print it in a single line
in stdout. No files will be created and only errors
will be logged by default.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity of the tool's logs.
